name: Jessica's Marshmallow Clouds
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Use fresh marshmallows only.
Combine flour, cocoa powder, and baking soda in a medium bowl. Set aside.
In a large bowl, combine sugars. Using an electric mixer, blend in butter until well combined. Add eggs and vanilla extract, and beat at medium speed until light and fluffy. Gradually add the flour mixture and chocolate chips, blending at low speed until just combined. The batter will be very stiff.
Gather 4-5 marshmallows in the palm of your hand and cover them with a heaping tablespoonful of dough. Form the dough around the marshmallows, completely enclosing them to form a 2-inch-diameter dough ball. Place the balls on ungreased baking sheets, about 2 inches apart.
Bake for 15 minutes. Cool on the pan for 2 minutes before transferring to a cool, flat surface.
